_info.description: Complete translation template for Solon Digital website - ALL hardcoded content extracted
_info.sections: ChatBot FAQ, FAQ Section, Reviews, Services, Cost of Waiting, Hidden Cost, Vision, Dashboard, Stats, Insights/Blog, Our Story, UI Labels
_info.instructions:
1. Copy this template to each language: TRANSLATION_TEMPLATE_es.json, TRANSLATION_TEMPLATE_it.json, TRANSLATION_TEMPLATE_nl.json
2. Translate all 'value' fields (keep 'key' unchanged)
3. Return completed files for import into locale files

seo_info.en: SEO helps you appear on Google. Our clients see results in 3-6 months.

automation_info.en: AI automation handles inquiries, bookings, and leads 24/7 without you doing anything.

default_response.en: I don't understand that question. 🤔 Ask me about services, pricing, or timeline?

header_subtitle.en: Everything you need to know about our services

q1_question.en: How long does it take to build a website?

q1_answer.en: 1-2 weeks depending on what needs to happen. Simple websites start faster, while complex projects with integrations take longer.

q2_answer.en: Yes! We offer support with all projects including updates, security patches, and performance optimization.

q3_question.en: Can I expand my website later?

q3_answer.en: Absolutely. We build scalable solutions from day one. Adding new features, integrations, or pages is straightforward with our modular approach.

q4_question.en: Do you guarantee Google first page ranking?

q4_answer.en: We don't guarantee rankings, but we implement proven SEO strategies. Our clients typically see top positions within 3-6 months for targeted keywords.

q5_question.en: How does AI automation help my business?

q5_answer.en: AI automation handles repetitive tasks: customer support, lead qualification, booking scheduling, form responses. This saves time while improving customer experience and conversion rates.

q6_answer.en: We support English, Spanish, Italian, and Dutch. We can build multilingual websites and chatbots for your audience.

header_subtitle.en: Businesses worldwide have grown with our solutions

review1_text.en: Solon Digital completely transformed our business. In 3 months, we tripled our bookings. Excellent customer service and the automation works perfectly.

review2_text.en: The AI automation they implemented is incredible. Now I receive qualified leads automatically. In two months I closed 5 sales that I wouldn't have been able to make otherwise.

review3_text.en: Professional, efficient and results-oriented. They truly understand the local Tenerife market. My website now appears on Google's first page. Highly recommended!

cost_of_waiting.description: 'The Cost of Waiting' section - problem/pain point messaging

subtitle.en: Every day you delay is a day your competitors gain ground.

painpoint1_description.en: Every day your site is slow, 40% of your visitors bounce to a competitor. That's pure profit walking out the door.

painpoint2_description.en: Managing bookings via WhatsApp and manual calls is a full-time job you shouldn't have. We automate the grind.

painpoint3_description.en: If you aren't on page 1 of Google, you don't exist for the 100,000+ tourists searching for your service right now.

cta_text.en: Schedule your growth audit today. Let's show you exactly what you're losing.

title.en: Every day you wait is a day your competition wins.

subtitle.en: A slow, outdated website isn't just an eyesore—it's a profit killer.

pillar1_description.en: While your site struggles to load, your potential clients are already booking with the competitor next door. You aren't just losing a click; you're losing a lifetime customer.

pillar2_description.en: Still handling every booking and question manually? That's 10+ hours a week stolen from your business growth or your family time. Automation isn't a luxury; it's your freedom.

pillar3_description.en: The Google algorithm doesn't wait for anyone. The longer you stay on an old platform, the harder it becomes to ever catch up. Don't wake up a year from now wishing you started today.

warning_heading.en: Don't wake up a year from now wishing you started today.

warning_text.en: Your competitors are moving fast. Every day you hesitate is a day they pull further ahead.

blog_post1_title.en: Is Your Website a Digital Ghost? The Hidden Cost of Outdated Web Design in Tenerife

blog_post1_excerpt.en: Tenerife is a land of opportunity, but many businesses are still living in the digital stone age. Discover why outdated websites are your biggest hidden expense.

blog_post1_content_intro.en: Tenerife is a land of opportunity. From the bustling streets of Adeje and Los Cristianos to the luxury villas in Costa Adeje, the business spirit here is unmatched. But while the island's physical infrastructure thrives, many businesses are still living in the digital stone age.

blog_post1_section1_title.en: The "Mañana" Trap: Why Speed is Your Greatest Competitor

blog_post1_section1_content.en: In the Tenerife web design market, we often hear "mañana." But online, there is no tomorrow. Statistics show that 40% of visitors will leave a site if it takes more than 3 seconds to load. At Solon Digital, we build "Lava-Fast" systems.

blog_post1_section2_title.en: Stop the WhatsApp Chaos: Automate or Die

blog_post1_section2_content.en: Are you still handling every single booking, inquiry, and question manually through WhatsApp? You aren't being personal—you are being inefficient. Smart Websites now act as your 24/7 Digital Employee.

blog_post1_section3_content.en: We moved from the Netherlands to Tenerife because we saw local legends losing money to bad tech. With background in AI integration and experience running 6 successful PT Studios, we combine Northern European efficiency with deep Tenerife market understanding.

blog_post1_section4_title.en: The Blunt Truth: Is Your Site Bleeding Money?

blog_post1_section4_content.en: A website should be an investment that pays for itself within months. If you aren't on Page 1 of Google, you don't exist for the 100,000+ tourists searching for your service right now.

blog_post1_section5_content.en: Stop guessing and start scaling. We're offering a Free Digital Growth Audit. We'll identify exactly where your current site is losing you money.
